name: Mali GPU Optimization
description: All-in-one Mali TBDR (Helio G100 / G57 MC2) performance tuning for Minecraft 26.1.2. Fills the gaps other mods don't: dynamic FPS, adaptive render/sim distance, audio-thread sound throttle, graphics auto-preset, and disconnect resource-leak cleanup. VulkanMod-safe: engine-side only, no GL/Vulkan render-path hooks.

custom.maligpu:target: Mali-G57 MC2 / MediaTek Helio G100 (Valhall, TBDR)
